ALSO PRESENT WAS DEFENDANT SABRINA VOTO AND HER ATTORNEY OF RECORD, JAMES M. MILLAR. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER, INES S. SWANEY, WAS ALSO PRESENT AND TRANSLATED FOR MIRNA GONZALEZ. PLTF.'S AND DEFENSE WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF'S. AND DEFENSE EXHIBITS, I.D. AND EVID. PLTF. WAIVED OPENING ARGUMENT. DEFENSE PRESENTED OPENING ARGUMENT AFTER TESTIMONY OF WITNESSES. NO OPENING ARGUMENT BY PLTF. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BOTH SIDES. CASE SUBMITTED. EXHIBITS RETAINED.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MIRNA E. JUDGMENT IS ENTERED FOR DEFENANT AND FOR COST IN THE AMOUNT OF $251.90
